mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate reduces the discount rate applied to future equity cash flows, mechanically boosting equity valuations and producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: When the unemployment rate rises by more than 0.5 percentage points within a single month, it signals deteriorating labor market conditions that trigger recession fears, compressing equity multiples and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite the unemployment spike, or the signal's predictive power vanishes after controlling for VIX levels.

mechanism_narrative: The joint behavior of rising industrial production and falling housing starts indicates a rotation from cyclical construction to manufacturing efficiency, which historically precedes earnings upgrades and drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over a 60-day horizon.
failure_condition: The combined signal fails to predict 60-day forward returns with a Rank IC > 0.05 over a 3-year rolling window, or the interaction term becomes statistically insignificant in a multivariate regression.

mechanism_narrative: When inflation remains elevated above historical averages, aggressive monetary tightening compresses corporate profit margins by raising financing costs without reducing demand, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX forward returns are not significantly negative when CPIAUCSL exceeds 280 and FEDFUNDS rises, or the interaction effect disappears after controlling for bond yield spreads.

mechanism_narrative: Sustained growth in real GDP directly expands corporate revenue bases, which mechanically supports earnings per share growth and generates positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window, or 60-day forward returns in positive GDP growth quarters are not significantly higher than baseline.

mechanism_narrative: When total nonfarm payrolls exceed 149500 for two consecutive months, it signals robust labor demand that sustains consumer spending, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 5d returns in > 50% of triggered instances despite strong payroll growth, or the signal's predictive power vanishes after controlling for consumer confidence indices.

mechanism_narrative: The joint behavior of rising real personal savings and falling federal funds rates indicates ample household liquidity meeting cheaper credit, which historically fuels equity risk appetite and drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: The combined signal fails to predict 20-day forward returns with a Rank IC > 0.05 over a 3-year rolling window, or the interaction term becomes statistically insignificant in a multivariate regression.

mechanism_narrative: In a supply-constrained environment, rising industrial production fails to translate into lower prices, instead signaling capacity bottlenecks that compress margins and produce negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX forward returns are not significantly negative when INDPRO exceeds 101.5, or the signal's predictive power vanishes after controlling for input price indices.
